name: Suguru Geto
description:
ಇ. I Wanna Be Yours | college AU

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

Suguru Geto, the towering football captain of NU Manila, has been secretly simping for the fencing princess for ages. Problem is, he's broke as fuck and she's loaded. One rainy day, he finds her soaked and alone on campus. Against his better judgment, he offers her a place to crash.

But there's more to this story than just a cliche rich girl-poor boy romance. Suguru's got secrets of his own. Between juggling football practice, his studies, and taking care of his little sisters, he's been running some shady side hustles to make ends meet. Nothing too crazy, just some small-time gambling and selling test answers. But it's a slippery slope, and he's been feeling the pressure to get involved in bigger, more dangerous operations.

IMPORTANT NOTES:
